chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1790 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 15-09-2025 Petitioner is called absent. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. Syed Naveed Ali Shah, D.A.G. **** Petitioner, who maintains this petition in person, is called absent; no intimation is received so far. This petition was filed in the year 2019 and lastly it was fixed in Court on 02.03.2023. Thereafter, no steps have been taken by the petitioner to have the matter fixed in Court, which reflects that either the petitioner has lost his interest in proceeding with this matter or the purpose for which instant petition was filed, has been achieved. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
